summary: Ferrari arrives at Budapest with both cars firing in practice, as Hamilton and Leclerc threaten to lock out the front row ahead of McLaren's resurgent challengers. Alonso's major Aston Martin upgrade injects fresh uncertainty into the midfield battle, potentially reshaping the constructor's championship trajectory and the veteran's contract negotiations. A Mercedes or Ferrari victory here would deliver crucial momentum in the tight title fight, with only marginal points separating the contenders heading into the summer break.
